content:
Failure modes and recovery:
- Octowiki read fails → abort, don't process without context, re-queue the pair
- Classifier returns ambiguous result → route to triage queue, don't discard
- Write fails → pair stays unprocessed, gets retried next tick
- Whole tree crashes → inbox entry stays with processed: false, gets picked up next tick

The inbox as an append-only log with a processed flag is what makes recovery trivial — you never lose a message pair, you just retry unprocessed ones.

Testing approach: run the tree against a labelled dataset of real inbox pairs using characterisation testing, measure precision and recall per signal type, tune specialist prompts until false positive rate is low enough to trust auto-commit. Start conservative (only ratifications and explicit decisions), expand as classifier earns trust.

provenance.raw_agent: One tension not fully resolved: the spec says the tree runs on a message pair...
provenance.raw_user: Failure modes. The tree can fail at any node... Using the characterisation approach: run the tree against a labelled dataset...
